'''Ezrakh''' was one of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguards. In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]] he was infected by the [[Death Seed]] plague and died. While guarding Leia, he told her of his wife and children.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
